title: RION Ops RionObjectWriter
summary: The RionObjectWriter can serialize Java objects into RION - our fast, compact, versatile binary data format. The RionObjectWriter tutorial now explains how to write both acyclic and cyclic object graphs into RION.
content: The RionObjectWriter can serialize Java objects into RION - our fast, compact, versatile binary data format. The RionObjectWriter tutorial now explains how to write both acyclic and cyclic object graphs into RION.
